pi_items.source: Verified against export_result.sh line 69 and task description

privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data created specifically for the orphan cleanup audit. Eight orphan Profile vertices are seeded with emails: margaret.chen@tempmail.org, robert.williams@oldmail.net, aisha.rahman@defunct.co, peter.novak@closed.org, sarah.murphy@expired.net, liu.wei@inactive.cn, fatima.ali@removed.org, and dmitri.volkov@gone.ru. Four orphan Hotel vertices are seeded: Albergo Cesari, Pousada do Porto Freixo, Ryokan Shimizu, and Hotel Neri. These orphans are inserted by setup_task.sh with no edge connections. The audit report is required at /home/ga/orientdb_audit_report.txt. Expected outcome is 12 total orphan vertices deleted.
